834	# Fused dKdV + dQ main backward path.  Computes dS once per (K-tile, Q-tile)
835	# pair and reuses it for dK, dV, and dQ, eliminating the duplicated S/dP/dS
836	# recompute and the repeated Q/V/DO loads of the separate dKdV + dQ kernels.
837	#
838	# Design:
839	#   pid -> K tile (grid = cdiv(Nk, BLOCK_N)).
840	#   For each Q tile in the contributing range:
841	#     Phase 1 — accumulate S and dP across head-dim chunks (split-D).
842	#     Phase 2 — compute dS (causal / bias / dropout), then loop over
843	#               head-dim chunks to accumulate dk (load/add/store), dv
844	#               (load/add/store), and dq (atomic_add).
845	#
846	# Split-D note:
847	#   dK/dV use global load/add/store identical to the existing dKdV-only
848	#   kernel.  This is inherent to split-D: the full head dimension does not
849	#   fit in registers.  TODO: full-D optimization would keep dk_acc / dv_acc
850	#   in registers with a single final cast+store per output tile.
851	#
852	#   dQ uses ``tl.atomic_add`` because multiple K-tile programs contribute to
853	#   the same Q tile.  The caller should allocate ``DQ`` in ``torch.float32``
854	#   (via ``grad_q_storage_dtype``) when cross-tile atomic-add precision is
855	#   a concern.
856	#
857	# NOTE: bf16 / fp16 native-DQ atomic_add precision collapse
858	#   (observed with N=8192, D=512, BLOCK_N=64, L20)
859	#
860	#   When DQ is stored in bf16 (7-bit mantissa) or fp16 (10-bit mantissa),
861	#   every ``tl.atomic_add(dq_ptrs, dq_contrib)`` performs an implicit
862	#   load→fp32-add→round-to-storage-dtype→store round-trip.  With
863	#   ``num_k_blocks = ceil(Nk / BLOCK_N) = 128`` K-tile programs each
864	#   contributing to the same Q-tile element, precision loss depends on
865	#   the *ratio* of each contribution to the running accumulator.
866	@triton.jit
867	def _ffpa_bwd_dkdvdq(
868	  Q: torch.Tensor,
869	  K: torch.Tensor,
870	  V: torch.Tensor,
871	  DO: torch.Tensor,
872	  DQ: torch.Tensor,
873	  DK: torch.Tensor,
874	  DV: torch.Tensor,
875	  LSE: torch.Tensor,
876	  D: torch.Tensor,
877	  AttnBias: torch.Tensor,
878	  GradAttnBias: torch.Tensor,
879	  softmax_scale: float,
880	  stride_qb: int,
881	  stride_qh: int,
882	  stride_qm: int,
883	  stride_kb: int,
884	  stride_kh: int,
885	  stride_kn: int,
886	  stride_vb: int,
887	  stride_vh: int,
888	  stride_vn: int,
889	  stride_dob: int,
890	  stride_doh: int,
891	  stride_dom: int,
892	  stride_dqb: int,
893	  stride_dqh: int,
894	  stride_dqm: int,
895	  stride_dkb: int,
896	  stride_dkh: int,
897	  stride_dkn: int,
898	  stride_dvb: int,
899	  stride_dvh: int,
900	  stride_dvn: int,
901	  stride_bb: int,
902	  stride_bh: int,
903	  stride_bm: int,
904	  stride_bn: int,
905	  stride_gbb: int,
906	  stride_gbh: int,
907	  stride_gbm: int,
908	  stride_gbn: int,
909	  nheads: int,
910	  seqlen_q: int,
911	  seqlen_k: int,
912	  seqlen_q_rounded: int,
913	  headdim: int,
914	  dropout_p: float,
915	  philox_offset: int,
916	  IS_CAUSAL: tl.constexpr,
917	  HAS_ATTN_BIAS: tl.constexpr,
918	  HAS_DROPOUT: tl.constexpr,
919	  PHILOX_SEED: tl.constexpr,
920	  BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD: tl.constexpr,
921	  GRAD_BIAS_NEEDS_REDUCTION: tl.constexpr,
922	  GRAD_BIAS_REDUCES_M: tl.constexpr,
923	  GRAD_BIAS_STORE_PARTIAL: tl.constexpr,
924	  BLOCK_HEADDIM: tl.constexpr,

927	  EVEN_N: tl.constexpr,

930	) -> None:

937	  K += off_b * stride_kb + off_h * stride_kh

940	  DQ += off_b * stride_dqb + off_h * stride_dqh

950	  num_d_chunks = tl.cdiv(headdim, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
951	  start_n = pid * BLOCK_N
952	  if start_n < seqlen_k:
953	    offs_n = start_n + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_N)
954	    offs_m = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)
955	    offs_d = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
956	    num_block_m = tl.cdiv(seqlen_q, BLOCK_M)
957	    begin_m = 0 if not IS_CAUSAL else start_n // BLOCK_M * BLOCK_M
958	
959	    for start_m in range(begin_m, num_block_m * BLOCK_M, BLOCK_M):
960	      offs_qm = start_m + offs_m
961	      if not EVEN_M:
962	        m_mask = offs_qm < seqlen_q
963	      S = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
964	      dP = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
965	
966	      # Phase 1 — accumulate S and dP over head-dim chunks.
967	      for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
968	        d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
969	        q = tl.load(
970	          Q + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_qm + d_offs[None, :],
971	          mask=(offs_qm[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
972	          other=0.,
973	        )
974	        k = tl.load(
975	          K + offs_n[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
976	          mask=(offs_n[:, None] < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
977	          other=0.,
978	        )
979	        v = tl.load(
980	          V + offs_n[:, None] * stride_vn + d_offs[None, :],
981	          mask=(offs_n[:, None] < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
982	          other=0.,
983	        )
984	        do = tl.load(
985	          DO + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_dom + d_offs[None, :],
986	          mask=(offs_qm[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
987	          other=0.,
988	        )
989	        S = tl.dot(q, tl.trans(k), acc=S)
990	        dP = tl.dot(do, tl.trans(v), acc=dP)
991	
992	      # Apply causal / bias / dropout — identical to _ffpa_bwd_dkdv.
993	      if not EVEN_N:
994	        S = tl.where(offs_n[None, :] < seqlen_k, S, float("-inf"))
995	      if not EVEN_M:
996	        S = tl.where(m_mask[:, None], S, float("-inf"))
997	      if IS_CAUSAL:
998	        S = tl.where(offs_qm[:, None] >= (offs_n[None, :]), S, float("-inf"))
999	      S = S * softmax_scale
1000	      if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1001	        bias = tl.load(
1002	          AttnBias + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_bm + offs_n[None, :] * stride_bn,
1003	          mask=(offs_qm[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (offs_n[None, :] < seqlen_k),
1004	          other=0.0,
1005	        )
1006	        S += bias
1007	      if EVEN_M:
1008	        lse_i = tl.load(LSE + offs_qm)
1009	      else:
1010	        lse_i = tl.load(LSE + offs_qm, mask=m_mask, other=0.0)
1011	      P = tl.exp(S - lse_i[:, None])
1012	      dropout_mult = _dropout_multiplier(
1013	        off_hb,
1014	        offs_qm,
1015	        offs_n,
1016	        seqlen_q,
1017	        seqlen_k,
1018	        dropout_p,
1019	        PHILOX_SEED,
1020	        philox_offset,
1021	        HAS_DROPOUT,
1022	      )
1023	      dP = dP * dropout_mult
1024	      P_drop = P * dropout_mult
1025	      if EVEN_M:
1026	        Di = tl.load(D + offs_qm)
1027	      else:
1028	        Di = tl.load(D + offs_qm, mask=m_mask, other=0.0)
1029	      if BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD:
1030	        dBias = P * (dP - Di[:, None])
1031	        grad_bias_mask = (offs_qm[:, None]
1032	                          < seqlen_q) & (offs_n[None, :] < seqlen_k)
1033	        if GRAD_BIAS_REDUCES_M:
1034	          m_block = start_m // BLOCK_M
1035	          grad_bias_ptrs = GradAttnBias + m_block * stride_gbm + offs_n * stride_gbn
1036	          grad_bias = tl.sum(tl.where(grad_bias_mask, dBias, 0.0), axis=0)
1037	          if GRAD_BIAS_STORE_PARTIAL:
1038	            tl.store(grad_bias_ptrs, grad_bias, mask=offs_n < seqlen_k)
1039	          else:
1040	            tl.atomic_add(
1041	              grad_bias_ptrs, grad_bias, sem="relaxed", mask=offs_n < seqlen_k
1042	            )
1043	        elif GRAD_BIAS_NEEDS_REDUCTION:
1044	          grad_bias_ptrs = (
1045	            GradAttnBias + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_gbm +
1046	            offs_n[None, :] * stride_gbn
1047	          )
1048	          tl.atomic_add(
1049	            grad_bias_ptrs, dBias, sem="relaxed", mask=grad_bias_mask
1050	          )
1051	        else:
1052	          grad_bias_ptrs = (
1053	            GradAttnBias + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_gbm +
1054	            offs_n[None, :] * stride_gbn
1055	          )

1068	                        < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim)
1069	        grad_mask_q = (offs_qm[:, None]

1073	        q = tl.load(
1074	          Q + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_qm + d_offs[None, :],
1075	          mask=grad_mask_q,
1076	          other=0.,
1077	        )

1082	            dk_ptrs, dk_d, mask=grad_mask_kv, eviction_policy="evict_last"

1084	        else:
1085	          dk_val = tl.load(
1086	            dk_ptrs, mask=grad_mask_kv, other=0., eviction_policy="evict_last"
1087	          )
1088	          tl.store(
1089	            dk_ptrs,
1090	            dk_val + dk_d,
1091	            mask=grad_mask_kv,
1092	            eviction_policy="evict_last",
1093	          )
1094	
1095	        # dv: reload DO -> dv_contrib = P_drop^T @ DO -> load/add/store DV.
1096	        do = tl.load(
1097	          DO + offs_qm[:, None] * stride_dom + d_offs[None, :],
1098	          mask=grad_mask_q,
1099	          other=0.,
1100	        )
1101	        dv_ptrs = DV + offs_n[:, None] * stride_dvn + d_offs[None, :]
1102	        dv_d = tl.trans(
1103	          tl.dot(tl.trans(do), P_drop.to(DTYPE), out_dtype=tl.float32)
1104	        )
1105	        if start_m == begin_m:
1106	          tl.store(
1107	            dv_ptrs, dv_d, mask=grad_mask_kv, eviction_policy="evict_last"
1108	          )
1109	        else:
1110	          dv_val = tl.load(
1111	            dv_ptrs, mask=grad_mask_kv, other=0., eviction_policy="evict_last"
1112	          )
1113	          tl.store(
1114	            dv_ptrs,

1173	  stride_dqh: int,
1174	  stride_dqm: int,
1175	  stride_bb: int,
1176	  stride_bh: int,
1177	  stride_bm: int,
1178	  stride_bn: int,
1179	  nheads: int,
1180	  seqlen_q: int,
1181	  seqlen_k: int,
1182	  seqlen_q_rounded: int,
1183	  headdim: int,
1184	  dropout_p: float,
1185	  philox_offset: int,
1186	  IS_CAUSAL: tl.constexpr,
1187	  HAS_ATTN_BIAS: tl.constexpr,
1188	  HAS_DROPOUT: tl.constexpr,
1189	  PHILOX_SEED: tl.constexpr,
1190	  BLOCK_HEADDIM: tl.constexpr,
1191	  DTYPE: tl.constexpr,
1192	  EVEN_N: tl.constexpr,
1193	  BLOCK_M: tl.constexpr,
1194	  BLOCK_N: tl.constexpr,
1195	) -> None:
1196	  pid = tl.program_id(0)
1197	  off_hb = tl.program_id(2)
1198	  off_b = off_hb // nheads
1199	  off_h = off_hb % nheads
1200	
1201	  Q += off_b * stride_qb + off_h * stride_qh
1202	  K += off_b * stride_kb + off_h * stride_kh
1203	  V += off_b * stride_vb + off_h * stride_vh
1204	  DO += off_b * stride_dob + off_h * stride_doh
1205	  DQ += off_b * stride_dqb + off_h * stride_dqh
1206	  D += off_hb * seqlen_q_rounded
1207	  LSE += off_hb * seqlen_q_rounded
1208	  if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1209	    AttnBias += off_b * stride_bb + off_h * stride_bh
1210	
1211	  num_d_chunks = tl.cdiv(headdim, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
1212	  start_m = pid * BLOCK_M
1213	  if start_m < seqlen_q:
1214	    offs_m = start_m + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)
1215	    offs_n = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_N)
1216	    offs_d = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
1217	
1218	    num_block_n = tl.cdiv(seqlen_k, BLOCK_N)
1219	    end_n_k = start_m + BLOCK_M if IS_CAUSAL else num_block_n * BLOCK_N
1220	
1221	    for start_n_k in range(0, end_n_k, BLOCK_N):
1222	      offs_nk = start_n_k + offs_n
1223	      S_qk = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1224	      dP_qk = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1225	
1226	      for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1227	        d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1228	        q = tl.load(
1229	          Q + offs_m[:, None] * stride_qm + d_offs[None, :],
1230	          mask=(offs_m[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1231	          other=0.,
1232	        )
1233	        k = tl.load(
1234	          K + offs_nk[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1235	          mask=(offs_nk[:, None] < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1236	          other=0.,
1237	        )
1238	        v = tl.load(
1239	          V + offs_nk[:, None] * stride_vn + d_offs[None, :],
1240	          mask=(offs_nk[:, None] < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1241	          other=0.,
1242	        )
1243	        do = tl.load(
1244	          DO + offs_m[:, None] * stride_dom + d_offs[None, :],
1245	          mask=(offs_m[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1246	          other=0.,
1247	        )
1248	        S_qk = tl.dot(q, tl.trans(k), acc=S_qk)
1249	        dP_qk = tl.dot(do, tl.trans(v), acc=dP_qk)
1250	
1251	      if not EVEN_N:
1252	        S_qk = tl.where(offs_nk[None, :] < seqlen_k, S_qk, float("-inf"))
1253	      if IS_CAUSAL:
1254	        S_qk = tl.where(
1255	          offs_m[:, None] >= (offs_nk[None, :]), S_qk, float("-inf")
1256	        )
1257	      S_qk = S_qk * softmax_scale
1258	      if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1259	        bias = tl.load(
1260	          AttnBias + offs_m[:, None] * stride_bm + offs_nk[None, :] * stride_bn,
1261	          mask=(offs_m[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (offs_nk[None, :] < seqlen_k),
1262	          other=0.0,
1263	        )
1264	        S_qk += bias
1265	      lse_i = tl.load(LSE + offs_m)
1266	      P_qk = tl.exp(S_qk - lse_i[:, None])
1267	      dropout_mult_qk = _dropout_multiplier(
1268	        off_hb,
1269	        offs_m,
1270	        offs_nk,
1271	        seqlen_q,
1272	        seqlen_k,
1273	        dropout_p,
1274	        PHILOX_SEED,
1275	        philox_offset,
1276	        HAS_DROPOUT,
1277	      )
1278	      dP_qk = dP_qk * dropout_mult_qk
1279	      Di = tl.load(D + offs_m)
1280	      dS_qk = (P_qk * (dP_qk - Di[:, None]) * softmax_scale).to(DTYPE)
1281	
1282	      for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1283	        d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1284	        k = tl.load(
1285	          K + offs_nk[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1286	          mask=(offs_nk[:, None] < seqlen_k) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1287	          other=0.,
1288	        )
1289	        dq_ptrs = DQ + offs_m[:, None] * stride_dqm + d_offs[None, :]
1290	        dq_mask = (offs_m[:, None] < seqlen_q) & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim)
1291	        if start_n_k == 0:
1292	          dq_d = tl.dot(dS_qk, k, out_dtype=tl.float32)
1293	          tl.store(dq_ptrs, dq_d, mask=dq_mask, eviction_policy="evict_last")
1294	        else:
1295	          dq_val = tl.load(
1296	            dq_ptrs, mask=dq_mask, other=0., eviction_policy="evict_last"
1297	          )
1298	          dq_d = tl.dot(dS_qk, k, out_dtype=tl.float32)
1299	          tl.store(
1300	            dq_ptrs, dq_val + dq_d, mask=dq_mask, eviction_policy="evict_last"
1301	          )

1484	def _get_bwd_autotune(
1485	  headdim: int, autotune_mode: str, bias_requires_grad: bool
1486	):
1487	  """Return an autotune wrapper for the main backward kernel.
1488	
1489	  :param headdim: Runtime head dimension used by the config generator.
1490	  :param autotune_mode: Search-space mode, ``"fast"`` or ``"max"``.
1491	  :param bias_requires_grad: Whether GradAttnBias may need reset between
1492	      autotune candidate runs.
1493	  :return: Triton autotune wrapper for ``_ffpa_bwd_kernel_impl``.
1494	  """
1495	  cache_key = (headdim, autotune_mode, bias_requires_grad)
1496	  if cache_key not in _ffpa_bwd_autotune_cache:
1497	    configs = _gen_bwd_autotune_configs(
1498	      headdim=headdim,
1499	      autotune_mode=autotune_mode,
1500	    )
1501	    reset_args = ["DK", "DV", "DQ"]
1502	    if bias_requires_grad:
1503	      reset_args.append("GradAttnBias")
1504	    _ffpa_bwd_autotune_cache[cache_key] = triton.autotune(
1505	      configs=configs,
1506	      key=[
1507	        "autotune_seqlen_q_bucket",
1508	        "autotune_seqlen_k_bucket",
1509	        "headdim",
1510	        "autotune_causal_key",
1511	        "autotune_dtype_key",
1512	      ],
1513	      reset_to_zero=reset_args,
1514	      cache_results=True,
1515	    )(_ffpa_bwd_kernel_impl)
1516	  return _ffpa_bwd_autotune_cache[cache_key]

1568	def _gen_decode_bwd_stage1_autotune_configs(
1569	  headdim: int = 512,
1570	  use_gemv: bool = False,
1571	  autotune_mode: str = "max",
1572	) -> list[triton.Config]:
1573	  """Generate decode-backward stage1 autotune configs.
1574	
1575	  :param headdim: Runtime head dimension.  Kept in the signature for caller
1576	      symmetry; decode backward uses the same bounded search space for fast and
1577	      max because only bwd_main gets an expanded max search.
1578	  :param use_gemv: Whether the target shape is the single-query GEMV path.
1579	  :param autotune_mode: Accepted search-space mode, ``"fast"`` or ``"max"``.
1580	  :return: Triton autotune configs for the decode backward stage1 kernel.
1581	  """
1582	  del autotune_mode
1583	
1584	  headdim_candidates = [64, 128]
1585	  if headdim == 256:
1586	    headdim_candidates.append(256)
1587	  block_n_candidates = [64, 128]
1588	  block_m_candidates = [8] if use_gemv else [16]
1589	
1590	  configs = []
1591	  for block_n in block_n_candidates:
1592	    for block_m in block_m_candidates:
1593	      for block_headdim in headdim_candidates:
1594	        for num_stages in [2]:
1595	          configs.append(
1596	            triton.Config(
1597	              {
1598	                "BLOCK_M": block_m,
1599	                "BLOCK_N": block_n,
1600	                "BLOCK_HEADDIM": block_headdim,
1601	              },
1602	              num_warps=8,
1603	              num_stages=num_stages,
1604	            )
1605	          )
1606	  return configs
1607

1609	_ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_autotune_cache: dict[tuple[int, bool, str, bool],
1610	                                             callable] = {}

1613	def _get_decode_bwd_stage1_autotune(
1614	  headdim: int,
1615	  use_gemv: bool,
1616	  autotune_mode: str,
1617	  bias_requires_grad: bool,
1618	):
1619	  """Return an autotune wrapper for the decode backward stage1 kernel."""
1620	  cache_key = (headdim, use_gemv, autotune_mode, bias_requires_grad)
1621	  if cache_key not in _ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_autotune_cache:
1622	    reset_args = ["DK", "DV", "PartialDQ"]
1623	    if bias_requires_grad:
1624	      # Decode stage1 can also accumulate or alias compact mask gradients
1625	      # across autotune candidate runs, so GradAttnBias must be reset too.
1626	      reset_args.append("GradAttnBias")
1627	    _ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_autotune_cache[cache_key] = triton.autotune(
1628	      configs=_gen_decode_bwd_stage1_autotune_configs(
1629	        headdim=headdim,
1630	        use_gemv=use_gemv,
1631	        autotune_mode=autotune_mode,
1632	      ),
1633	      key=[
1634	        "autotune_seqlen_q_bucket",
1635	        "autotune_seqlen_k_bucket",
1636	        "headdim",
1637	        "autotune_causal_key",
1638	        "autotune_dtype_key",
1639	      ],
1640	      reset_to_zero=reset_args,
1641	      cache_results=True,
1642	    )(_ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_kernel)
1643	  return _ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_autotune_cache[cache_key]

1646	@triton.jit
1647	def _ffpa_bwd_key_bias_grad_reduce_kernel(
1648	  PartialGradBias: torch.Tensor,
1649	  GradAttnBias: torch.Tensor,
1650	  seqlen_k: int,
1651	  total_rows: int,
1652	  stride_gbn: int,
1653	  BLOCK_N: tl.constexpr,
1654	  BLOCK_R: tl.constexpr,
1655	) -> None:
1656	  start_n = tl.program_id(0) * BLOCK_N
1657	  offs_n = start_n + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_N)
1658	  offs_r = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_R)
1659	  mask_n = offs_n < seqlen_k
1660	  acc = tl.zeros([BLOCK_R, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1661	  for start_r in range(0, total_rows, BLOCK_R):
1662	    rows = start_r + offs_r
1663	    partial = tl.load(
1664	      PartialGradBias + rows[:, None] * seqlen_k + offs_n[None, :],
1665	      mask=(rows[:, None] < total_rows) & mask_n[None, :],
1666	      other=0.0,
1667	    )
1668	    acc += partial
1669	  grad = tl.sum(acc, axis=0)
1670	  tl.store(GradAttnBias + offs_n * stride_gbn, grad, mask=mask_n)
1671	
1672	
1673	@triton.jit
1674	def _ffpa_bwd_decode_stage1_kernel(
1675	  Q: torch.Tensor,
1676	  K: torch.Tensor,
1677	  V: torch.Tensor,
1678	  DO: torch.Tensor,
1679	  DK: torch.Tensor,
1680	  DV: torch.Tensor,
1681	  PartialDQ: torch.Tensor,
1682	  WrittenKBlocks: torch.Tensor,
1683	  LSE: torch.Tensor,
1684	  D: torch.Tensor,
1685	  AttnBias: torch.Tensor,
1686	  GradAttnBias: torch.Tensor,
1687	  softmax_scale: float,
1688	  stride_qb: int,
1689	  stride_qh: int,
1690	  stride_qm: int,
1691	  stride_kb: int,
1692	  stride_kh: int,
1693	  stride_kn: int,
1694	  stride_vb: int,
1695	  stride_vh: int,
1696	  stride_vn: int,
1697	  stride_dob: int,
1698	  stride_doh: int,
1699	  stride_dom: int,
1700	  stride_dkb: int,
1701	  stride_dkh: int,
1702	  stride_dkn: int,
1703	  stride_dvb: int,
1704	  stride_dvh: int,
1705	  stride_dvn: int,
1706	  stride_pqb: int,
1707	  stride_pqh: int,
1708	  stride_pqk: int,
1709	  stride_pqm: int,
1710	  stride_bb: int,
1711	  stride_bh: int,
1712	  stride_bm: int,
1713	  stride_bn: int,
1714	  stride_gbb: int,
1715	  stride_gbh: int,
1716	  stride_gbm: int,
1717	  stride_gbn: int,
1718	  nheads: int,
1719	  seqlen_q: int,
1720	  seqlen_k: int,
1721	  autotune_seqlen_q_bucket: int,
1722	  autotune_seqlen_k_bucket: int,
1723	  autotune_causal_key: int,
1724	  autotune_dtype_key: int,
1725	  seqlen_q_rounded: int,
1726	  headdim: int,
1727	  dropout_p: float,
1728	  philox_offset: int,
1729	  IS_CAUSAL: tl.constexpr,
1730	  HAS_ATTN_BIAS: tl.constexpr,
1731	  HAS_DROPOUT: tl.constexpr,
1732	  PHILOX_SEED: tl.constexpr,
1733	  BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD: tl.constexpr,
1734	  GRAD_BIAS_NEEDS_REDUCTION: tl.constexpr,
1735	  GRAD_BIAS_REDUCES_M: tl.constexpr,
1736	  DTYPE: tl.constexpr,
1737	  USE_GEMV: tl.constexpr,
1738	  BLOCK_M: tl.constexpr,
1739	  BLOCK_N: tl.constexpr,
1740	  BLOCK_HEADDIM: tl.constexpr,
1741	) -> None:
1742	  # Keys for autotune and heuristics lookups.
1743	  _ = autotune_seqlen_q_bucket
1744	  _ = autotune_seqlen_k_bucket
1745	  _ = autotune_causal_key
1746	  _ = autotune_dtype_key
1747	
1748	  # Decode backward splits work by K block. DK/DV are independent per K block,
1749	  # but dQ is a sum over all K blocks, so stage1 writes PartialDQ and the reduce
1750	  # kernel below performs the cross-K accumulation.
1751	  start_n_block = tl.program_id(0)
1752	  off_hb = tl.program_id(1)
1753	  off_b = off_hb // nheads
1754	  off_h = off_hb % nheads
1755	
1756	  if start_n_block == 0:
1757	    tl.store(WrittenKBlocks + off_hb, tl.num_programs(0))
1758	
1759	  Q += off_b * stride_qb + off_h * stride_qh
1760	  K += off_b * stride_kb + off_h * stride_kh
1761	  V += off_b * stride_vb + off_h * stride_vh
1762	  DO += off_b * stride_dob + off_h * stride_doh
1763	  DK += off_b * stride_dkb + off_h * stride_dkh
1764	  DV += off_b * stride_dvb + off_h * stride_dvh
1765	  PartialDQ += off_b * stride_pqb + off_h * stride_pqh + start_n_block * stride_pqk
1766	  LSE += off_hb * seqlen_q_rounded
1767	  D += off_hb * seqlen_q_rounded
1768	  if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1769	    AttnBias += off_b * stride_bb + off_h * stride_bh
1770	  if BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD:
1771	    GradAttnBias += off_b * stride_gbb + off_h * stride_gbh
1772	
1773	  offs_n = start_n_block * BLOCK_N + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_N)
1774	  offs_m = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)
1775	  offs_d = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
1776	  mask_n = offs_n < seqlen_k
1777	  mask_m = offs_m < seqlen_q
1778	  num_d_chunks = tl.cdiv(headdim, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
1779	
1780	  if USE_GEMV:
1781	    scores = tl.zeros([BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1782	    dP = tl.zeros([BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1783	    for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1784	      d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1785	      q = tl.load(Q + d_offs, mask=d_offs < headdim, other=0.0).to(tl.float32)
1786	      do = tl.load(DO + d_offs, mask=d_offs < headdim, other=0.0).to(tl.float32)
1787	      k = tl.load(
1788	        K + offs_n[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1789	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1790	        other=0.0,
1791	      ).to(tl.float32)
1792	      v = tl.load(
1793	        V + offs_n[:, None] * stride_vn + d_offs[None, :],
1794	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1795	        other=0.0,
1796	      ).to(tl.float32)
1797	      scores += tl.sum(k * q[None, :], axis=1)
1798	      dP += tl.sum(v * do[None, :], axis=1)
1799	
1800	    scores = scores * softmax_scale
1801	    if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1802	      # USE_GEMV is only used for Nq == 1, so the bias pointer has no query
1803	      # offset; broadcasted batch/head/key strides were already encoded by the
1804	      # launcher.
1805	      bias = tl.load(AttnBias + offs_n * stride_bn, mask=mask_n, other=0.0)
1806	      scores += bias
1807	    if IS_CAUSAL:
1808	      # With a single tail-aligned query, all real K positions are legal. The
1809	      # mask still guards padded BLOCK_N lanes.
1810	      scores = tl.where(offs_n <= (seqlen_k - 1), scores, -float("inf"))
1811	    scores = tl.where(mask_n, scores, -float("inf"))
1812	
1813	    lse_i = tl.load(LSE)
1814	    P = tl.exp(scores - lse_i)
1815	    dropout_mult = tl.full([BLOCK_N], 1.0, dtype=tl.float32)
1816	    if HAS_DROPOUT:
1817	      linear = off_hb * seqlen_q * seqlen_k + offs_n
1818	      rand = _curand_uniform_from_element_offset(
1819	        PHILOX_SEED, philox_offset + linear
1820	      )
1821	      keep = rand > dropout_p
1822	      dropout_mult = keep * (1.0 / (1.0 - dropout_p))
1823	    dP = dP * dropout_mult
1824	    P_drop = P * dropout_mult
1825	    delta_i = tl.load(D)
1826	    dBias = P * (dP - delta_i)
1827	    dS = dBias * softmax_scale
1828	
1829	    if BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD:
1830	      grad_bias_ptrs = GradAttnBias + offs_n * stride_gbn
1831	      if GRAD_BIAS_NEEDS_REDUCTION:
1832	        tl.atomic_add(grad_bias_ptrs, dBias, sem="relaxed", mask=mask_n)
1833	      else:
1834	        tl.store(grad_bias_ptrs, dBias, mask=mask_n)
1835	
1836	    for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1837	      d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1838	      q = tl.load(Q + d_offs, mask=d_offs < headdim, other=0.0).to(tl.float32)
1839	      do = tl.load(DO + d_offs, mask=d_offs < headdim, other=0.0).to(tl.float32)
1840	      k = tl.load(
1841	        K + offs_n[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1842	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1843	        other=0.0,
1844	      ).to(tl.float32)
1845	      dk = dS[:, None] * q[None, :]
1846	      dv = P_drop[:, None] * do[None, :]
1847	      tl.store(
1848	        DK + offs_n[:, None] * stride_dkn + d_offs[None, :],
1849	        dk,
1850	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1851	      )
1852	      tl.store(
1853	        DV + offs_n[:, None] * stride_dvn + d_offs[None, :],
1854	        dv,
1855	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1856	      )
1857	      partial_dq = tl.sum(dS[:, None] * k, axis=0)
1858	      tl.store(PartialDQ + d_offs, partial_dq, mask=d_offs < headdim)
1859	  else:
1860	    scores = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1861	    dP = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_N], dtype=tl.float32)
1862	    for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1863	      d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1864	      q = tl.load(
1865	        Q + offs_m[:, None] * stride_qm + d_offs[None, :],
1866	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1867	        other=0.0,
1868	      )
1869	      do = tl.load(
1870	        DO + offs_m[:, None] * stride_dom + d_offs[None, :],
1871	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1872	        other=0.0,
1873	      )
1874	      k = tl.load(
1875	        K + offs_n[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1876	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1877	        other=0.0,
1878	      )
1879	      v = tl.load(
1880	        V + offs_n[:, None] * stride_vn + d_offs[None, :],
1881	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1882	        other=0.0,
1883	      )
1884	      scores = tl.dot(q, tl.trans(k), acc=scores)
1885	      dP = tl.dot(do, tl.trans(v), acc=dP)
1886	
1887	    scores = scores * softmax_scale
1888	    if HAS_ATTN_BIAS:
1889	      bias = tl.load(
1890	        AttnBias + offs_m[:, None] * stride_bm + offs_n[None, :] * stride_bn,
1891	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & mask_n[None, :],
1892	        other=0.0,
1893	      )
1894	      scores += bias
1895	    scores = tl.where(mask_n[None, :], scores, -float("inf"))
1896	    if IS_CAUSAL:
1897	      kv_offset = seqlen_k - seqlen_q
1898	      # Tail-aligned lower-right causal mask for decode windows where Nq can be
1899	      # smaller than Nkv. A query row m sees keys up to m + (Nkv - Nq).
1900	      causal_mask = offs_n[None, :] <= (offs_m[:, None] + kv_offset)
1901	      scores = tl.where(causal_mask, scores, -float("inf"))
1902	    scores = tl.where(mask_m[:, None], scores, -float("inf"))
1903	
1904	    lse_i = tl.load(LSE + offs_m, mask=mask_m, other=-float("inf"))
1905	    P = tl.exp(scores - lse_i[:, None])
1906	    score_mask = mask_m[:, None] & mask_n[None, :]
1907	    P = tl.where(score_mask, P, 0.0)
1908	    dropout_mult = _dropout_multiplier(
1909	      off_hb,
1910	      offs_m,
1911	      offs_n,
1912	      seqlen_q,
1913	      seqlen_k,
1914	      dropout_p,
1915	      PHILOX_SEED,
1916	      philox_offset,
1917	      HAS_DROPOUT,
1918	    )
1919	    dP = dP * dropout_mult
1920	    P_drop = P * dropout_mult
1921	    delta_i = tl.load(D + offs_m, mask=mask_m, other=0.0)
1922	    dBias = P * (dP - delta_i[:, None])
1923	    dBias = tl.where(score_mask, dBias, 0.0)
1924	    dS = (dBias * softmax_scale).to(DTYPE)
1925	
1926	    if BIAS_REQUIRES_GRAD:
1927	      grad_bias_mask = mask_m[:, None] & mask_n[None, :]
1928	      # Decode can also receive compact masks. Query-broadcast masks reduce the
1929	      # M dimension inside the tile first; other broadcast dimensions use
1930	      # atomic adds to merge aliases across programs.
1931	      if GRAD_BIAS_REDUCES_M:
1932	        grad_bias_ptrs = GradAttnBias + offs_n * stride_gbn
1933	        grad_bias = tl.sum(tl.where(grad_bias_mask, dBias, 0.0), axis=0)
1934	        tl.atomic_add(grad_bias_ptrs, grad_bias, sem="relaxed", mask=mask_n)
1935	      elif GRAD_BIAS_NEEDS_REDUCTION:
1936	        grad_bias_ptrs = GradAttnBias + offs_m[:, None] * stride_gbm + offs_n[
1937	          None, :] * stride_gbn
1938	        tl.atomic_add(grad_bias_ptrs, dBias, sem="relaxed", mask=grad_bias_mask)
1939	      else:
1940	        grad_bias_ptrs = GradAttnBias + offs_m[:, None] * stride_gbm + offs_n[
1941	          None, :] * stride_gbn
1942	        tl.store(grad_bias_ptrs, dBias, mask=grad_bias_mask)
1943	
1944	    for d_chunk in range(num_d_chunks):
1945	      d_offs = d_chunk * BLOCK_HEADDIM + offs_d
1946	      q = tl.load(
1947	        Q + offs_m[:, None] * stride_qm + d_offs[None, :],
1948	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1949	        other=0.0,
1950	      )
1951	      do = tl.load(
1952	        DO + offs_m[:, None] * stride_dom + d_offs[None, :],
1953	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1954	        other=0.0,
1955	      )
1956	      k = tl.load(
1957	        K + offs_n[:, None] * stride_kn + d_offs[None, :],
1958	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1959	        other=0.0,
1960	      )
1961	      dk = tl.dot(tl.trans(dS), q, out_dtype=tl.float32)
1962	      dv = tl.dot(tl.trans(P_drop.to(DTYPE)), do, out_dtype=tl.float32)
1963	      partial_dq = tl.dot(dS, k, out_dtype=tl.float32)
1964	      tl.store(
1965	        DK + offs_n[:, None] * stride_dkn + d_offs[None, :],
1966	        dk,
1967	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1968	      )
1969	      tl.store(
1970	        DV + offs_n[:, None] * stride_dvn + d_offs[None, :],
1971	        dv,
1972	        mask=mask_n[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1973	      )
1974	      tl.store(
1975	        PartialDQ + offs_m[:, None] * stride_pqm + d_offs[None, :],
1976	        partial_dq,
1977	        mask=mask_m[:, None] & (d_offs[None, :] < headdim),
1978	      )
1979	
1980	
1981	@triton.jit
1982	def _ffpa_bwd_decode_dq_reduce_kernel(
1983	  PartialDQ: torch.Tensor,
1984	  WrittenKBlocks: torch.Tensor,
1985	  DQ: torch.Tensor,
1986	  stride_pqb: int,
1987	  stride_pqh: int,
1988	  stride_pqk: int,
1989	  stride_pqm: int,
1990	  stride_dqb: int,
1991	  stride_dqh: int,
1992	  stride_dqm: int,
1993	  nheads: int,
1994	  seqlen_q: int,
1995	  headdim: int,
1996	  BLOCK_K: tl.constexpr,
1997	  BLOCK_M: tl.constexpr,
1998	  BLOCK_HEADDIM: tl.constexpr,
1999	) -> None:
2000	  d_block = tl.program_id(0)
2001	  q_block = tl.program_id(1)
2002	  off_hb = tl.program_id(2)
2003	  off_b = off_hb // nheads
2004	  off_h = off_hb % nheads
2005	
2006	  offs_k = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_K)
2007	  offs_m = q_block * BLOCK_M + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_M)
2008	  offs_d = d_block * BLOCK_HEADDIM + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_HEADDIM)
2009	  mask_m = offs_m < seqlen_q
2010	  acc = tl.zeros([BLOCK_M, BLOCK_HEADDIM], dtype=tl.float32)
2011	  written_k_blocks = tl.load(WrittenKBlocks + off_hb)
2012	  PartialDQ += off_b * stride_pqb + off_h * stride_pqh
2013	  for start_k in range(0, written_k_blocks, BLOCK_K):
2014	    k_blocks = start_k + offs_k
2015	    partial = tl.load(
2016	      PartialDQ + k_blocks[:, None, None] * stride_pqk +
2017	      offs_m[None, :, None] * stride_pqm + offs_d[None, None, :],
2018	      mask=(k_blocks[:, None, None] < written_k_blocks) & mask_m[None, :, None]
2019	      & (offs_d[None, None, :] < headdim),
2020	      other=0.0,
2021	    )
2022	    acc += tl.sum(partial, axis=0)
2023	  DQ += off_b * stride_dqb + off_h * stride_dqh
2024	  tl.store(
2025	    DQ + offs_m[:, None] * stride_dqm + offs_d[None, :],
2026	    acc,
2027	    mask=mask_m[:, None] & (offs_d[None, :] < headdim),
2028	  )
2029	
2030	
2031	def _ffpa_attn_backward_triton_impl(
2032	  do: torch.Tensor,
2033	  q: torch.Tensor,
2034	  k: torch.Tensor,
2035	  v: torch.Tensor,
2036	  o: torch.Tensor,
2037	  lse: torch.Tensor,
2038	  attn_bias: torch.Tensor | None,
2039	  dq: torch.Tensor,
2040	  dk: torch.Tensor,
2041	  dv: torch.Tensor,
2042	  grad_attn_bias: torch.Tensor | None,
2043	  causal: bool = False,
2044	  softmax_scale: float | None = None,
2045	  autotune: bool = False,
2046	  autotune_mode: str = "fast",
2047	  preprocess_d_chunk: bool = False,
2048	  original_nheads_kv: int | None = None,
2049	  dropout_p: float = 0.0,
2050	  philox_seed: int = 0,
2051	  philox_offset: int = 0,
2052	  enable_tma: bool = False,
2053	  enable_ws: bool = False,
2054	  enable_persist_dkdv: bool = False,
2055	  enable_split_launch: bool = False,
2056	) -> None:
2057	  """Run the Triton FFPA Split-D backward kernels in place.
2058	
2059	  This is the low-level Triton implementation entrypoint used by the public
2060	  wrapper below. Callers are expected to perform all FFPA-specific tensor
2061	  preparation before entering here:
2062	
2063	  * ``lse`` must already expose the padded last-dimension storage required by
2064	    masked Triton loads
2065	  * any GQA/MQA expansion of ``k`` and ``v`` must already be done
2066	  * ``dq``, ``dk``, and ``dv`` must already be allocated with the expanded
2067	    head layout expected by the selected kernel
2068	
2069	  The function only computes delta, dispatches the chosen Triton backward
2070	  kernel, and writes gradients into the provided output buffers.
2071	
2072	  :param do: Upstream output gradient with layout ``[B, Nh, Nq, D]``.
2073	  :param q: Query tensor saved from forward, layout ``[B, Nh, Nq, D]``.
2074	  :param k: Key tensor saved from forward, layout ``[B, Nh, Nk, D]``.
2075	  :param v: Value tensor saved from forward, layout ``[B, Nh, Nk, D]``.
2076	  :param o: Forward output tensor, layout ``[B, Nh, Nq, D]``.
2077	  :param lse: Forward softmax log-sum-exp tensor with visible layout
2078	    ``[B, Nh, Nq]`` and storage rounded on the last dimension.
2079	  :param dq: Query-gradient output tensor, written in place.
2080	  :param dk: Key-gradient output tensor, written in place.
2081	  :param dv: Value-gradient output tensor, written in place.
2082	  :param causal: Whether the forward pass used lower-triangular causal
2083	    masking.
2084	  :param softmax_scale: Scale applied to ``Q @ K.T``. Defaults to
2085	    ``1 / sqrt(D)`` when ``None``.
2086	  :param autotune: Whether to run Triton's autotuner for the preprocess and
2087	    main backward kernel.
2088	  :param preprocess_d_chunk: Whether the delta preprocess kernel should split
2089	    the head dimension into ``BLOCK_HEADDIM`` chunks instead of processing the
2090	    full head dimension in one program.
2091	  :param original_nheads_kv: Original KV-head count before GQA/MQA expansion.
2092	  """
2093	  if do.stride(-1) != 1:
2094	    do = do.contiguous()
2095	  batch, nheads, seqlen_q, headdim = q.shape
2096	  _, _, seqlen_k, _ = k.shape
2097	  original_nheads_kv = original_nheads_kv or nheads
2098	  softmax_scale = softmax_scale or (1.0 / math.sqrt(headdim))
